metadata.title: 29. Human Body - Senses - Eyes, Ears and Nose

questions.question: The most common use of ‘silicone hydrogels’ is making of which among the following?
questions.explanation: Silicone hydrogel and regular hydrogel lenses both are made of plastics that are hard when dry but readily absorb water and become soft and gel-like when hydrated. They are most commonly used in making Contact Lenses.

questions.question: Which among the following diseases is also known as "Pink Eye"?
questions.explanation: Pink eye or Conjunctivitis is an irritation or inflammation of the conjunctiva, which covers the white part of the eyeball. It can be caused by allergies or a bacterial or viral infection.

questions.question: Which among the following makes the Cornea Transplantation easy and used more widely ?

options.label: B
options.text: Cornea does not link up with blood vessels

answer.label: B
answer.text: Cornea does not link up with blood vessels

questions.explanation: A cornea transplant also called as keratoplasty is a surgical procedure to replace part of your cornea with corneal tissue from a donor. Cornea does not link up with blood vessels, this makes the Cornea Transplantation easy and used more widely.

questions.question: Lacrimal apparatus, Lacrimal artery, Lacrimal bone, Lacrimal ducts, Lacrimal fossa, Lacrimal fluid & Lacrimal gland are parts of which organ of the body?
questions.explanation: These are parts of lacrimal apparatus in eye which is responsible for tear production and drainage.

questions.question: Which among the following live tissues of the Human Eye does not have blood vessels?
questions.explanation: Cornea does not have blood vessels. It is the transparent part of the eye that covers the front portion of the eye. It covers the pupil, iris, and anterior chamber.
